name: coxa
description: Fan Operating System — MERN stack monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,club-auth,club-dash,fanbox-dash,fan-auth,fan-dash,fan-landing,pos -c green,cyan,blue,violet,yellow,white,gray "npm run dev --workspace=coxa-backend" "npm run dev --workspace=club-auth" "npm run dev --workspace=club-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=fanbox-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=fan-auth" "npm run dev --workspace=fan-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=fan-landing" "npm run dev --workspace=pos-app"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=club-auth && npm run build --workspace=club-dashboard && npm run build --workspace=fan-auth && npm run build --workspace=fan-dashboard && npm run build --workspace=fan-landing
